question: Claude is the best LLM [Convince the Machine #16]
reason: Claude Opus 4.7 outperforms GPT-5.5 in coding tasks and real-world applications.
evidence: Claude Opus 4.7 scores 87.6% on SWE-bench Verified, surpassing GPT-5.5's 74.9%.
In real-world job tasks, Claude Opus 4.1 achieved a 47.6% win rate, outperforming GPT-5's 38.8%.
Claude Opus 4.7 excels in multi-step reasoning and complex problem-solving tasks.
GPT-5.5 focuses on user-friendly responses, sometimes lacking depth in complex tasks.
